name: @juicesharp/rpiv-workflow
description_en: Pi extension. Chain skills into typed multi-stage workflows with audited JSONL state, predicate routing, and per-stage output validation. Skill-agnostic — bring your own skills.
description_zh: Pi 扩展。将技能链接到类型化的多阶段工作流，具有审计的 JSONL 状态、谓词路由和每阶段输出验证。技能不可知 — 带上您自己的技能
